summary: Verified redesigned Data Pipeline visualization in About section. All 10 requested checks pass: 5 stages (Extract, Transform, Load, AI/ML, Analyze) rendered as icons+labels (no circle outline nodes), correct alternating orange/white color scheme, 5 continuously animating glowing particles with staggered delays flowing left->right in a loop, gradient flow line SVG present behind particles, and mobile (390px) layout fits all 5 labels visibly. Bio text and heading render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: About.jsx DataPipelineVisualization uses percentage-based left animation on absolute-positioned particles; on very narrow viewports the '8%'->'92%' range works well since it's relative to parent width. No issues observed at 390px.

SVG flow line uses viewBox=0 0 100 100 with preserveAspectRatio=none stretched to full container -- line renders subtly as intended, though vertical position (y=35) is somewhat separated from icon row (icons are below on screen). Acceptable per design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified via computed styles: particle 'left' values shift each 600ms sample, opacity fades in/out (values 0.23-1.0 observed), animation loops via Framer Motion repeat:Infinity. Icon colors verified as rgb(217,108,74) for Extract/Load/Analyze and rgba(255,255,255,0.7) for Transform/AI-ML.
